content.site.name: Compass Coaching
content.site.description: 1:1 coaching, group programs, and a members library to help you ship the work that matters. Placeholder copy for the Aqua portal generator's second target shape.
content.navbar.subtitle: Practical clarity for ambitious operators
content.footer.description: Compass Coaching is a placeholder client used to validate the Aqua portal's per-client materialization pipeline. The brand kit, plugin set, and variant assignments differ deliberately from Luv & Ker so the export-to-repo generator must handle real shape variation.
content.hero.body: 1:1 sessions, structured programs, and a members library — built for operators who need clarity faster than a usual coaching arc delivers.
content.pricing.headline: Pick your altitude.
content.pricing.tagline: Three tiers. Cancel anytime. The library opens with every paid tier.

pricing.tiers.name: Scout
pricing.tiers.summary: The library starter — 5 essays, 1 office-hour drop a month.

pricing.tiers.name: Navigator
pricing.tiers.summary: Full library access + monthly group office hours + Slack circle.

pricing.tiers.name: Captain
pricing.tiers.summary: Everything in Navigator + 1 hour 1:1 with the founder per month + WIP review.

content.members.headline: The library.
content.members.body: Essays, audio briefings, and templates. Sign in to read everything; the previews open to anyone.
